case_title: JOSEPH FINO VS. GOOGLE LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $580.00 FILED BY FINO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT GOOGLE LLC HUAWEI TECHNOLOGIES USA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT GOOGLE LLC
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JOSEPH FINO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GOOGLE LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RAQUEL SMALL-WEIKERT, LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT HUAWEI TECHNOLOGIES INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR BOTH DEFENDANT'S ARE DEFECTIVE AS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS WAS NOT SERVED. DEFENDANT GOOGLE LLC WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
